name: Bouillabaisse#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam mussels for 3-4 minutes.
2. Dissolve saffron in warm wine; set aside.
3. Melt butter; add garlic, onion, carrot, celery, and seasonings (nutmeg, basil, thyme).
4. Add soy sauce and cover. Simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Add water and remaining wine; bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Serve with toasted bread.
